organization: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER)
details: Assisted in dry-lab modeling of synaptic signaling pathways in zebrafish nervous systems using cell-tracking software.
Developed Python scripts to automate clean-up of high-throughput microscopic imaging files, cutting processing times by 40%.
Collaborated on a poster presentation highlighting macrophage behavior during neuro-inflammation events.
Led weekly review sections for 25 biology juniors covering synaptic transmissions, action potentials, and sensory systems.
Held office hours to explain scientific computation methods using Matlab/Python for biological modeling projects.
Founded a local running collective of 120+ active community members to promote health, wellness, and mental reset.
Design and map out weekly 5K/10K routes, organize timing volunteers, and manage our online Instagram/Strava engagement pages.
Awarded a prestigious summer fellowship to study environmental impacts on local aquatic ecology.
Analyzed pH variations, micro-plastic sediment layers, and oxygen concentrations in freshwater environments.
